headline: The Long Collapse Century: September 11 Attacks

events.title: 2000 US Presidential Election
events.description: George W. Bush wins after Supreme Court halts Florida recount

events.title: Dot-Com Crash Aftermath
events.description: Greenspan cuts rates to 1%; loose monetary policy seeds housing bubble

events.title: September 11 Attacks
events.description: 1-2 flights hit targets; others intercepted or failed
events.explanation: Earlier FAA response or passenger awareness prevents full attack

events.title: China Joins WTO
events.description: Full WTO accession with minimal enforcement of conditions

events.title: Post-9/11 Security Architecture
events.description: Targeted counterterrorism with civil liberties prioritized

events.title: Opioid Crisis
events.description: Addiction treated as health issue early; harm reduction

events.title: Columbia Shuttle Disaster
events.description: Shuttle destroyed on re-entry; program eventually ends

events.title: Iraq War Decision
events.description: US-led coalition invades Iraq; Saddam toppled

events.title: Post-Genome Era
events.description: Genetic discrimination becomes major issue; insurance and employers use genetic data

events.title: BRICS / Emerging Market Boom
events.description: BRICS economies boom 2003-2011, then stagnate except China

events.title: Social Media Emergence
events.description: Ad-funded, engagement-maximizing platforms dominate

events.title: Drone Warfare Program
events.description: US drone strike program expands globally

events.title: Record Hurricane Season
events.description: Fewer storms; FEMA not tested and remains complacent

events.title: Indian Ocean Tsunami
events.description: 230K dead across 14 countries; no warning system existed

events.title: Hurricane Katrina Response
events.description: Pre-positioned assets; fewer than 100 deaths
events.explanation: Mandatory evacuation enforced; FEMA fully resourced

events.title: Katrina Racial Reckoning
events.description: Racial dimensions of Katrina ignored

events.title: Cloud Computing / AWS
events.description: AWS, Azure, GCP dominate; hyperscaler model wins

events.title: North Korea Nuclear
events.description: Denuclearization deal with verification

events.title: Smartphone Revolution
events.description: Open mobile platforms dominate over walled gardens
events.explanation: Linux-based open phones gain traction before iPhone

events.title: US Shale / Fracking Revolution
events.description: Environmental concerns limit fracking; US remains net energy importer

events.title: Beijing Olympics
events.description: Spectacular games; China arrives on world stage

events.title: 2008 Financial Crisis
events.description: Better regulation prevented worst; mild downturn
events.explanation: Derivatives regulated post-Enron; housing bubble smaller

events.title: 2008 US Presidential Election
events.description: John McCain wins; Republican continuity through financial crisis

events.title: Twitter Becomes Political Infrastructure
events.description: Aggressive content moderation from 2012 prevents weaponization of the platform
events.explanation: Twitter invests heavily in moderation; political manipulation is curtailed early

events.title: Haiti Earthquake
events.description: Red Cross and NGO failures dominate the narrative

events.title: Collapse of Local Journalism
events.description: 2,500+ newspapers close 2005-2030; news deserts cover a third of US counties

events.title: Deepwater Horizon Oil Spill
events.description: Spill triggers aggressive pivot to renewable energy investment

events.title: Euro Sovereign Debt Crisis
events.description: Greece exits the euro; contagion spreads

events.title: SpaceX and Reusable Rocketry
events.description: Private space doesn't take off; NASA and ESA dominate with high-cost launches
events.explanation: Regulatory barriers and risk aversion prevent commercial space from flourishing

events.title: Stuxnet / Cyber Warfare
events.description: Stuxnet discovered; opens era of state-sponsored cyber weapons

events.title: WikiLeaks / Information Warfare
events.description: Manning leaks; diplomatic cables; Assange saga

events.title: Arab Spring
events.description: Tunisia succeeds; Egypt coup; Libya/Syria civil war

events.title: Fukushima Nuclear Disaster
events.description: Backup systems work; minimal radiation release

events.title: Libya Intervention
events.description: No Western intervention; Gaddafi suppresses revolt

events.title: Bin Laden Operation
events.description: Helicopter crash aborts mission; bin Laden escapes Abbottabad compound

events.title: US Debt Ceiling Crises
events.description: Repeated debt ceiling crises; brinkmanship becomes norm

events.title: Solar Cost Revolution
events.description: Non-Chinese solar manufacturing develops; slower but more resilient supply chain

events.title: Occupy Wall Street
events.description: Protests gain attention but produce no lasting institutional impact

events.title: Instagram / Visual Social Media
events.description: Youth reject visual social media after early backlash against comparison culture
events.explanation: Cultural shift against performative social media limits Instagram's influence

events.title: YouTube Recommendation Radicalization
events.description: Algorithm optimizes for engagement, systematically driving users toward extremism

events.title: ZIRP Era / Quantitative Easing
events.description: Rate hikes begin 2014; slower but more stable growth

events.title: Deep Learning / AlexNet Breakthrough
events.description: Deep learning + GPUs transform AI; massive investment follows

events.title: China — Xi Consolidation
events.description: Reform faction maintains collective leadership

events.title: Sandy Hook / Gun Control
events.description: Manchin-Toomey fails; no federal gun legislation passes

events.title: Streaming and Media Fragmentation
events.description: Streaming services fragment the shared media landscape into algorithmic niches

events.title: Pope Francis Election
events.description: A doctrinally conservative pope is elected; no climate encyclical
events.explanation: Conclave selects a traditionalist European cardinal

events.title: Boston Marathon Bombing
events.description: Pressure cooker bombs at finish line; 3 dead, 264 injured

events.title: Post-Fukushima Nuclear Policy Shift
events.description: Germany phases out nuclear; Japan offline for years; global nuclear capacity stalls

events.title: Snowden Revelations
events.description: Smaller leak; less public impact

events.title: Syria Red Line
events.description: Obama doesn't enforce red line; Russia brokers deal

events.title: Bitcoin / Cryptocurrency
events.description: $2T+ speculative asset class; minimal real-world currency use

events.title: Venezuela Collapse
events.description: Maduro overthrown; democratic transition

events.title: Deaths of Despair / Life Expectancy
events.description: Trend reverses by 2025 through intervention

events.title: West Africa Ebola Outbreak
events.description: 28,600 cases, 11,325 deaths in West Africa; lessons largely forgotten

events.title: MH370 Disappearance
events.description: Aircraft vanishes; never found despite extensive search
